name: uuid-ai-mcp
description: AI-powered uuid ai MCP server for agents. Supports generate uuid, parse uuid, generate ulid. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_uuid
tools.description: Generate one or more UUIDs. Supports versions 1, 3, 4, and 5.

tools.name: parse_uuid
tools.description: Parse and validate a UUID string, extracting all components.

tools.name: generate_ulid
tools.description: Generate ULID(s) - Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifiers.

tools.name: generate_nanoid
tools.description: Generate NanoID(s) - compact URL-friendly unique identifiers.

tools.name: batch_generate
tools.description: Batch generate identifiers of a specified type. Efficient for bulk operations.
